title: festuca cinerea f. longifolia
intro: Festuca cinerea f. longifolia, also known as Long-leaved Grey Fescue, is a perennial grass species belonging to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and phenolic compounds. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Festuca cinerea f. longifolia is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
